overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval village at night. The character navigates narrow cobblestone alleys illuminated by torchlight, passes a stable with horses, traverses back passages with wooden sheds, and emerges onto a wider main street before turning to face the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone alley between stone buildings approaching stable

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a narrow cobblestone alley between high stone walls toward a large wooden stable building

notable_agents.action: villager walking away from camera toward the stable entrance

large two-story wooden stable structure with shingled roof and arched openings

wooden picket fence enclosing the stable yard with horses visible inside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow cobblestone alley flanked by tall stone walls. The camera follows Geralt as he walks toward a large wooden stable building ahead. A villager walks ahead in the same direction, and horses are visible within the fenced stable area. Warm torchlight illuminates the stone walls against the cool night atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: stable courtyard and covered brick archway passage

passes through a stone brick archway into a back alley

agents.ego_description: turns left past the stable and walks through a narrow passage with brick walls, passing under a stone archway

entered.detail: red brick wall with rough texture and mounted torch
semicircular stone brick archway connecting the passages
red brick wall with wooden door and lantern

segments.scene_description: Geralt turns left past the stable into a narrower passage with red brick walls. He approaches and passes through a stone archway that leads into a back alley. The lighting shifts as he moves under the arch, with torches mounted on the brick walls providing warm illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with wooden storage sheds and scaffolding

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the cloudy night sky visible between the buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow back alleys lined with wooden sheds and storage structures, briefly looks up at the cloudy sky

entered.detail: small dark wooden storage shed with slanted roof
wooden shed with barred windows and weathered planks
tall stone wall with wooden scaffolding and construction materials
stacked wooden barrels and crates beside the shed
dark canvas awning stretched over the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment follows Geralt through a narrow back alley flanked by wooden storage sheds and tall stone walls. Wooden barrels and a canvas canopy appear along the path. Midway through, the camera tilts upward to reveal the cloudy night sky between the buildings before continuing forward toward a large wooden gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: main village street with stone buildings and torch lighting

events.description: opens and passes through a large wooden gate into a wider cobblestone street
character stops walking and turns around to face the camera

agents.ego_description: opens a large wooden gate and walks through into a wider street, then stops and turns to face the camera

entered.detail: tall double wooden gate with metal hinges and brackets that swings open
two-story stone building with arched doorway and shuttered windows
burning lantern mounted on wooden post
wooden cart with large wheels parked near building
tall stone building with steep roof and multiple windows

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches and opens a large wooden gate, emerging from the narrow alleys into a wider cobblestone main street lined with stone buildings. He walks down the street past burning lanterns and a wooden cart, then stops and turns to face the camera, revealing the cloudy night sky above the village.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a series of claustrophobic medieval alleys that gradually open into a wider village street. It begins in a narrow cobblestone passage flanked by tall stone walls, following Geralt as he passes a fenced stable illuminated by warm torchlight. As he turns left, the environment shifts to red brick walls and a stone archway, leading the camera deeper into a back alley lined with wooden storage sheds, barrels, and canvas canopies. The perspective briefly tilts upward toward the cloudy night sky before continuing forward to a large wooden gate. Finally, the camera follows Geralt as he opens the gate and emerges onto a broad cobblestone main street with burning lanterns and a wooden cart, where he stops and turns to face the camera.
